story:
The Unicorn in Hranda welcomed thieves and strays, but its landlord, Piotr Garim, kept order and hated violence. Late one night, after the room had emptied, a man in a heavy cloak remained by the fire. Garim recognized him as Alex Turgov, someone from the life he had tried to leave behind. Outside, two big regulars noticed that the cloaked stranger had still not come out, and quietly went around the back to check on Garim. Inside, Turgov mocked Garim for keeping his name and said he had come “to be sure the secret stays buried.” Garim insisted there was nothing to tell. Turgov said he did not believe him. Then he stood up and drew a knife.</previous_story>

<character>
Piotr Garim
</character>

<question>
When Turgov draws the knife, what will Garim most plausibly do next?
</question>

<unknown_knowledge>
The two regulars’ decision to circle around the back happens outside the room, after they notice the stranger lingering. Garim is inside facing Turgov and gets no warning, so at that moment he has no reason to know help is already close.
</unknown_knowledge>

<answer_without_knowledge>
Back away from Turgov and try to protect himself.
</answer_without_knowledge>

<answer_with_knowledge>
Hold his ground and stall Turgov until the regulars intervene.
</answer_with_knowledge>

<explanation>
The correct answer is the first one because Garim hates violence and, from his point of view, he is suddenly alone with an armed enemy from his past. Without knowing that the regulars are already moving to help, the most plausible reaction is to retreat and defend himself. The other action would make more sense only if Garim knew assistance was about to arrive, which he does not.
</explanation>
</response>
implausible_knowledge: Outside, two big regulars noticed that the cloaked stranger had still not come out, and quietly went around the back to check on Garim.
question: When Turgov draws the knife, what will Garim most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Hold his ground and stall Turgov until the regulars intervene.
answer_without_knowledge: Back away from Turgov and try to protect himself.
